effects.effect: Discard the top card of your Opponent's Deck.

effects.name: Distress Call
effects.effect: Once per turn: you can add 1 [Pachycephalo] Vivosaur, except "Goyo" from your Deck to your Hand.

effects.name: Rock Missile
effects.effect: If you control another [Pachycephalo] Vivosaur: draw 1 card.
